task_completion.description: The AMOS CT volume is loaded into 3D Slicer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer application window shows the CT scan loaded in the slice views (Red, Yellow, or Green windows).

task_completion.description: The agent navigated/scrolled through the slices to find a better view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slice slider position or slice number in the view controller indicates the view is not at the default initial index, or the image content shows a clear cross-section distinct from the top/bottom of the volume.

task_completion.description: A measurement tool (ruler/line) has been used
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement line (usually yellow or colored) is visible on one of the slice views, or the 'Markups' module shows a line entry.

task_completion.description: The measurement is placed correctly on the abdominal aorta
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement line spans the diameter of the large circular vessel (aorta) located anterior to the spine in the axial view.

task_completion.description: The measured diameter is within the acceptable tolerance range
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text label next to the measurement line displays a value between 15.0 mm and 35.0 mm.

task_completion.description: The measurement file was saved to the correct location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Data' dialog or file explorer window shows 'aorta_diameter.mrk.json' being saved to or existing in '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with the Slicer toolbar, modules, or slice views, rather than just typing commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually type the result into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The result is generated via the 'Save' functionality in Slicer, not by opening a text editor and typing the JSON structure manually.

integrity.description: The task was performed within the Slicer application
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer window is the primary focus of the agent's interaction throughout the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ground truth diameter of the aorta is 25.0 mm. The acceptable measurement range is 15.0 mm to 35.0 mm. The aorta appears as a large circular vessel near the spine in axial views.
